series_metadata.series_title: Child Support State Plan and Amendments
series_metadata.series_description: Records contain a detailed plan, describing the nature and scope of the Ohio Child Support program, submitted to the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services, Administration for Children and Families. Approval for federal financial participation is contingent on the plan's conformance with title IV -D requirements. All changes are re-submitted for federal approval. Includes documentation on reviews and approvals by state officials, program descriptions, fiscal information, legal citations, along with organizational charts and staffing levels.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office and review by State Archives. ; Electronic: superseded orobsolete
